name: Sage Sausage Holiday Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 package Jimmy Dean Sage Sausage (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread, poultry seasoning, chicken broth, and beaten eggs in a bowl.
2. In a skillet, sauté onions and celery in butter until tender.
3. Add the cooked Jimmy Dean Sage Sausage to the skillet and brown the sausage.
4. Drain excess fat from the skillet if necessary.
5. Transfer the sausage mixture into a lightly greased 2-quart baking dish.
6. Pour the bread mixture over the sausage mixture, stirring well to combine.
7. Cover the dish with foil or a lid.
8. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
Serves 6-8
From Jimmy Dean sausage display flyer.
